title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, allowed in OS settings, new UI
scenario: Notification settings remain locked in Poly Studio Mobile app after enabling notifications via OS settings post-onboarding
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and begin onboarding flow.
2. When prompted for notification permissions, tap "Don't Allow".
4. Navigate to device Settings → Notifications (or OS Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Notifications).
5. Enable notifications for the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: Notifications are shown as ON, and all notification settings are unlocked and user-changeable.
